utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with named plans, policy IDs, and total health cost—fully specified with costs. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with named plan, policy ID, coverage limits, and total property cost—fully specified with costs. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with plan, add-on, policy IDs, coverage details, and total travel cost—fully specified with costs. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement service with cost and total additional cost—fully specified with costs. 5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual costs, plus extra details—fully specified. Therefore, 5 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Map each selected item name exactly to corresponding rating from ground-truth. The final plan includes: InsurePlus Standard Plan (physical health) -> primary_health_coverage.physical_health rating 9; InsurePlus Standard Mental Health likely corresponds to InsurePlus Standard Plan under mental health -> rating 8; VitalPlus Standard Coverage (home contents) -> property_protection.home_content rating 7; InsurePlus Standard Adventure Travel -> mobility_coverage.travel_insurance InsurePlus Standard Plan rating 10; Adventure Equipment Add-on not present in ground-truth, so no rating; Premium Medical Network Enhancement maps to travel_enhancement_services Premium Medical Network rating 7.
